cityDNA.coreFantasy: An elemental caldera city where forges, alchemical labs, archives, border walls, hidden markets, and eclipse-ring government turn volatility into civic order.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: The Crucible is not only a fire city; the uploaded images show industry, alchemy, records, defense, and unofficial exchange arranged around elemental convergence.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: The Crucible turns raw crystal, basalt, copper, ritual geometry, forges, formula archives, public records, border discipline, and hidden economies into an institution for controlled danger.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Basalt terraces, raw crystal, copper bands, quartzite, arcane glow, living fires, smoke stacks, blue alchemical lamps, archive towers, border walls, black-market arcades, and eclipse-ring courts.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Elemental folk civic culture organized around pressure control, dangerous craft, formal records, containment boundaries, and negotiated unofficial exchange.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Four living fires, eclipse rings, forge beacons, smoke stacks, blue lamps, gold seals, border banners, mist-veiled vaults, and raw crystal symbolize power under rules.

canonLocks: The Crucible is a mature elemental civic city, not a generic fire forge.
The Wonder is Elemental Crucible Ring of Four Living Fires.
The Beacon is Great Forge Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Eclipse Rings Sovereign Registry Court.
The five primary districts are Heavy Industry / Foundry, Arcane / Alchemical Labs, Records / Archives, Fortress / Border Wall, and Underworld / Hidden Economy.

Exact uploaded anchors include Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge Beacon, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook, Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook, Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook, Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook, Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade, Mist Veils Monument, and Understreet Vault Nook.
provisionalCanon: The Crucible's strongest civic read is contained intensity shaped into institutions.
The uploaded image and sidecar pass were folded into existing v2 fields without adding a new top-level image-analysis section.
rejectedReads: elemental spectacle with no civic records or boundaries
cautionFlags: Preserve exact uploaded sidecar anchor names.
Keep forge, alchemy, archives, border wall, and hidden economy visible together.
Elemental power should read as regulated pressure, not random chaos.

environment.environmentalLogic: The caldera is organized into regulated heat, records, routes, labs, and boundaries; the city survives by making volatile forces procedural.

forms: Elemental Crucible Ring of Four Living Fires
skyline: Elemental Crucible Ring of Four Living Fires as far wonder anchor
Eclipse Rings Sovereign Registry Court as central authority
Great Forge Beacon as industrial signal
forge stacks, alchemy towers, archive spires, border walls, and hidden arcades around caldera terraces

civilization.people: Elemental citizens are intense but institutionally trained; public life moves through safety rules, formula permissions, forge cycles, archive records, wall boundaries, and hidden negotiations.
civilization.governance: Eclipse Rings Sovereign Registry Court governs hazardous production, formula access, record authority, border control, and unofficial pressure valves.
civilization.religion: Ritual geometry, elemental convergence, living-fire circles, eclipse symbolism, and ward networks make civic restraint sacred-adjacent.

streets.appearance: Hot, angular, and luminous: forge plazas, alchemy courts, archive towers, walls, watch bastions, black-market passages, blue lamps, and raw crystal seams share the caldera terraces.
streets.movement: Movement follows heat-safe lanes, forge paths, lab corridors, archive stairs, wall walks, watch routes, and understreet vault approaches.
streets.lighting: Forge glow and raw crystal flare compete with controlled blue lamps and eclipse shadows.
streets.weatherEffects: Heat haze, ash, caldera wind, and crystal glare make regulated routes essential.
streets.dayCycle: Forge work, lab permissions, archive traffic, and wall drills dominate daytime.
streets.nightCycle: Blue lamps, living fires, hidden markets, and crystal glow dominate night.

housing.wealthy: Registry, alchemy, and forge-master terraces with crystal light, copper screens, and protected views of the caldera.
housing.middle: Workshop apartments, archive rooms, and guard-family homes along heat-safe public routes.
housing.poor: Hot lower terraces, service rooms, and vault-adjacent housing dependent on controlled routes and public lamps.

districts.name: Heavy Industry / Foundry
districts.civicPurpose: Production, public signal, dangerous labor, and elemental heat management.
districts.visualIdentity: Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge Beacon, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook.

districts.name: Arcane / Alchemical Labs
districts.civicPurpose: Formula control, research, reagent work, and dangerous invention.
districts.visualIdentity: Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook.

districts.name: Records / Archives
districts.civicPurpose: Official memory, hazard records, formula copies, and legal continuity.
districts.visualIdentity: Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook.

districts.name: Fortress / Border Wall
districts.civicPurpose: Boundary control, hazard containment, defense, and watch discipline.
districts.visualIdentity: Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook.

districts.name: Underworld / Hidden Economy
districts.civicPurpose: Unofficial exchange, pressure release, hidden storage, and risky workaround networks.
districts.visualIdentity: Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade, Mist Veils Monument, Understreet Vault Nook.

wonder.name: Elemental Crucible Ring of Four Living Fires
wonder.symbolicRole: Elemental convergence, civic restraint, and volatile unity made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Far skyline ring of living fires, crystal, basalt, copper, and ritual geometry above caldera terraces.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide rites, convergence ceremonies, hazard vows, and public identity.
storyHooks: A living fire changes color and exposes which institution has been lying about safety.

beacon.name: Great Forge Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Production warning and elemental pressure made public signal.
beacon.visualRole: Beacon rising from foundry civic halls, smoke stacks, and crucible routes.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates forge crews, alchemy labs, archives, border walls, and hidden-market reactions.
storyHooks: A Beacon change makes the entire city choose between productivity and safety.

seatOfPower.name: Eclipse Rings Sovereign Registry Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Balanced authority over competing elements, records, and danger.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central registry court with eclipse rings, sealed archives, audience terraces, and ritual geometry.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Governs hazardous labor, formula access, record disputes, border rules, and pressure-release policy.
storyHooks: An eclipse-ring record proves the city survived because someone broke procedure once.

majorLandmarks.name: Alchemy Lab
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Blue-lit lab with formula archive, glassware, reagents, and crystal light.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Research, formula control, and controlled risk.
storyHooks: A formula archive shows which fire was never natural.

majorLandmarks.name: Archive Tower
majorLandmarks.symbolicRole: Danger remembered so it can be governed.
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Archive tower with gold-seal monument, copyist hall, cool stone, and sealed stacks.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Public records, hazard history, and legal memory.
storyHooks: A copyist finds the first accident was recorded as a triumph.

majorLandmarks.name: Border Wall
majorLandmarks.symbolicRole: Boundary between civic order and uncontrolled force.
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Fortified wall with banners, watch bastion, and heat-resistant stone.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Defense, access control, hazard containment, and watch duty.
storyHooks: A watch bastion sees the danger inside the wall first.

majorLandmarks.name: Black Market Arcade
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Hidden arcade with mist veils, vault nook, lamp haze, and coded stalls.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Informal trade, workaround supply, hidden storage, and pressure release.
storyHooks: A broker has the safety part the official forge refused to requisition.

districtDioramaGuidance: S1 must show Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge Beacon, Smoke-Stack Monument, and Crucible Hall Nook.
S2 must show Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, and Formula Archive Nook.
S3 must show Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, and Copyist Hall Nook.
S4 must show Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall, Woven Banners Monument, and Watch Bastion Nook.
S5 must show Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade, Mist Veils Monument, and Understreet Vault Nook.
mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Elemental Crucible Ring of Four Living Fires, Great Forge Beacon, and Eclipse Rings Sovereign Registry Court legible together.
Use raw crystal, basalt, copper, quartzite, forge haze, blue alchemy lights, archive towers, border walls, and hidden-market arcades.
requiredVisualElements: Elemental Crucible Ring of Four Living Fires
